note: Crop-specific NPK thresholds from Kaggle Fertilizer dataset (Phase 3 lookup)

low_N.template: Nitrogen is low ({N} vs ~{target} target) for {crop} — apply urea-based fertilizer in split doses.

low_P.template: Phosphorus is low ({P} vs ~{target}) for {crop} — DAP supports root development and flowering.

low_K.template: Potassium is low ({K} vs ~{target}) for {crop} — MOP improves fruit quality and stress tolerance.

balanced.template: NPK levels look balanced for {crop}. Use maintenance dose and re-test soil after 4 weeks.
